title: Zehneria pentaphylla
taxonomy: Zehneria pentaphylla belongs to the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly known as the gourd or cucumber family. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Zehneria, which is a part of the Cucurbitales order. The Cucurbitaceae family is a diverse group of plants that include a wide variety of species, such as cucumbers, melons, and squash. Zehneria pentaphylla is native to parts of Asia and is often found growing in tropical and subtropical regions.
